name: @verdictos/scan
description: Security scanner for AI-generated code. Finds eval(), hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, and other vulnerabilities in code written by Cursor, Copilot, Claude, and other AI tools.
author: VerdictOS <admin@verdictos.tech>

scripts.postinstall: python3 -m pip install verdictos-scan --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip3 install verdictos-scan 2>/dev/null || echo 'Please install Python package: pip install verdictos-scan'
